ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The two following cases were called together: PCN-06-289347 Conservatorship of Marian K
Griffin and PTR-06-289348 In Re: Marian K Griffin.

Appearances: Sheila Robello for Gene Marchi (Conservator/Successor Trustee). Ernest Der for Deborah Covell (Beneficiary).

The Court noted that the Assignment, Waiver of Account and Waiver of Notice were filed. Mr. Der stated that they would like to get Camille's Trust funded. The Court granted the Petition for Termination in the Conservatorship case and granted the Sixth Account and Report of Successor Trustee in the Trust case (both subject to review of order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following cases were heard together: PCN-06-289347 Conservatorship of Marian K. Griffin and PTR-06-289348 In Re: Marian K. Griffin.

Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Gene Marchi.

Ms. Fox stated that there was no net income to distribute from the Trust in 2010. The Court approved both accounting petitions (subject to review of the orders). Status on filing of the Petition to Terminate Conservatorship and status on filing of the Sixth and Final Account in the Trust were set for September 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Fox is to prepare an Order Approving Status Report in the Conservatorship matter.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And Setting Trustee'S Bond And Requesting Periodic Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called with case #289347 (conservatorship of Marian Griffin).

Appearances: Arthur Park for and with Gene Marchi (Petitioner). Robin Ruderow Court-appointed Counsel for the Conservatee.

The Court excused the appearance of the Proposed Conservatee as she was unwilling to attend. Ms. Ruderow reported that the Proposed Conservatee liked working with Mr Marchi as her conservator. Mr. Park suggested a $40,000.00 bond since the remaining assets will be transferred to the trust, which Ms. Ruderow agreed with. The Court set the bond at $40,000.00, and stated that Mr. Marchi was authorized to transfer the assets to the trust pursuant to the June 2007 order. Ms. Ruderow will remain on for now. The Court granted the Petition appointing Gene Marchi the Conservator of the Person and Estate of Marian Griffin, (signing the Order for same in open court). Ms. Harel's final account is due by February 25, 2008. The Court will send her notice.

In regards to the trust matter, the Court found that the petition was procedurally in order, and approved the petition, (signing the Order for same in open court). The bond is set at $4,000,000.00.

Further Orders:
Inventory with proof of mailing (or order dispensing with mailing), notice of how to file objections, must be filed two weeks before: March 25, 2008.
First accounting must be filed two weeks before: February 23, 2009.
Bond is fixed at $4,000,000.00.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Ann Mendoza CSR#6812; Court Investigator: Mary Quinn; Bailiff: Felicia Smith; Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

FILING OF INVENTORY
Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Off Calendar

Ptn For Order To Bring Trust Under Crt Supervison
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa (Counsel for Rena Harel, Petitioner); Robin Rudderow (Court-appointed Counsel for the Conservatee); Camille Covell (Interested Person/Sister of the Conservatee).

After granting the Petition for the general conservatorship, the Court also granted the Petition bringing the Trust under Court supervision and appointing Rena Harel as the Successor Trustee.

Ms. Rudderow was asked to remain as Court-appointed Counsel for the Conservatee until further notice.

Further Orders:
Inventory and Appraisement must be filed two weeks before April 24, 2007.
First Account must be filed two weeks before March 18, 2008.
Bond is set at $1,160,000.00.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Investigator: Cynthia Jones.
